December 202420 min read

Renewable Power Generation Cost in 2024

An comprehensive interactive analysis of renewable energy cost trends with advanced data visualizations based on IRENA's 2024 report

Source: IRENA (International Renewable Energy Agency)•Data Year: 2024
Biggest Cost Reduction
Solar PV

90% LCOE reduction since 2010

Most Competitive
Onshore Wind

$0.034/kWh in 2024

Highest Capacity Factor
Geothermal

88% capacity factor

LCOE Comparison (2010 vs 2024)
Cost per kWh in USD
Cost Reduction Distribution
Percentage reduction in LCOE since 2010

This comprehensive analysis is based on data from the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA) 2024 report on renewable power generation costs.
